Project Questionnaire

Thanks for taking the time to complete this questionnaire. The more detail you share, the better I can scope the project and design and build a solution that works for your business.

Project Info

Thank You!

Your project brief has been submitted successfully. I've received your information and will review it carefully.

I'll get back to you within 1-2 business days with next steps and any follow-up questions.

Contact Information

Your Business & Audience

Section A of 2

Describe your ideal customer (role, industry, company size, location, etc.)

Briefly describe your main product(s) or service(s)

Any key differentiators, proof, or results you're proud of

Please share names and/or links

(DIY, different type of service, another tool, etc.)

Your Website & Project

Section B of 2

Examples: generate leads, book demos, recruit talent, explain a new product, etc.

Primary and secondary calls to action

E.g., Home, About, Services, Pricing, Careers, Blog, etc.

Examples: CMS for blog/case studies, forms/CRM, booking tool, job board, memberships, etc.

Logo, color palette, typography, imagery, brand guidelines

Please share 2-3 links and what you like about them (design, messaging, structure, etc.)

This helps me suggest the best approach and options

E.g., # of leads, demo bookings, applicants, traffic, etc.

Let's work together

I'm currently available for full-time roles and select freelance projects.
